import React, { Component } from 'react'; import { Tabs, Tab, Grid, Cell, Card, CardTitle, CardActions, Button, CardMenu, IconButton, CardText } from 'react-mdl'; class Projects extends Component { constructor(props) { super(props) this.state = { activeTab: 0 }; } toggleCategories() { return (this.state.activeTab === 0) ? {/* Project1 */} React project #1 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. {/* Project2 */} React project #2 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. {/* Project3 */} React project #3 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. : (this.state.activeTab === 1) ? {/* Project1 */} Gatsby project #1 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. {/* Project2 */} Gatsby project #2 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. {/* Project3 */} Gatsby project #3 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. : (this.state.activeTab === 2) ? {/* Project1 */} Javascript project #1 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. {/* Project2 */} Javascript project #2 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. {/* Project3 */} Javascript project #3 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. : {/* Project1 */} Node.js project #1 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. {/* Project2 */} Node.js project #2 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. {/* Project3 */} Node.js project #3 Leverage agile frameworks to provide a robust synopsis for high level overviews. } render() { return (
this.setState({ activeTab: tabId })} ripple> React Gatsby Javascript Node.js
{this.toggleCategories()}
); } } export default Projects;
